item.title: The Suspicious Disappearance of Fawn Marie Mountain: Missing Since 2012
item.description: Fawn Marie Mountain disappeared in 2012 under circumstances that quickly raised suspicion among her family and investigators. After she suddenly stopped contacting loved ones, concern grew and a search began, but years later she has never been found. As questions mounted about the people closest to her and the events leading up to her disappearance, the case turned into a haunting mystery that still remains unsolved today.

media:content.media:title: The Suspicious Disappearance of Fawn Marie Mountain: Missing Since 2012
media:content.media:description: Fawn Marie Mountain disappeared in 2012 under circumstances that quickly raised suspicion among her family and investigators. After she suddenly stopped contacting loved ones, concern grew and a search began, but years later she has never been found. As questions mounted about the people closest to her and the events leading up to her disappearance, the case turned into a haunting mystery that still remains unsolved today.

item.title: Disappearance Of Christopher Dansby & Shane Walker: Taken From Playground
item.description: Tragedy struck Harlem twice in 1989 when two toddlers, Christopher Dansby and Shane Walker, vanished from the same playground. Investigators linked their disappearances to the case of another missing toddler, and they explored leads from black-market baby rings to satanic cults. Over 30 years later, the boys’ families are still desperately waiting for their boys to come home.

media:content.media:title: Disappearance Of Christopher Dansby & Shane Walker: Taken From Playground
media:content.media:description: Tragedy struck Harlem twice in 1989 when two toddlers, Christopher Dansby and Shane Walker, vanished from the same playground. Investigators linked their disappearances to the case of another missing toddler, and they explored leads from black-market baby rings to satanic cults. Over 30 years later, the boys’ families are still desperately waiting for their boys to come home.

item.title: The Tiede Family Cabin Story
item.description: On December 22, 1990, Von Lester Taylor and Edward Deli broke into a remote cabin in Oakley, Utah, killing Kaye Tiede and her mother Beth Potts and kidnapping two of the family's daughters before being caught in a police chase. Taylor pleaded guilty to capital murder and was sentenced to death. Deli was convicted of second-degree murder and sentenced to life in prison. Taylor remains on death row after decades of appeals and as of 2025 has filed a fifth petition seeking a reduced sentence.

media:content.media:title: The Tiede Family Cabin Story
media:content.media:description: On December 22, 1990, Von Lester Taylor and Edward Deli broke into a remote cabin in Oakley, Utah, killing Kaye Tiede and her mother Beth Potts and kidnapping two of the family's daughters before being caught in a police chase. Taylor pleaded guilty to capital murder and was sentenced to death. Deli was convicted of second-degree murder and sentenced to life in prison. Taylor remains on death row after decades of appeals and as of 2025 has filed a fifth petition seeking a reduced sentence.

item.title: A Ski Resort Buried Overnight After the Alpine Meadows Disaster
item.description: In March of 1982, Alpine Meadows ski resort near Lake Tahoe was experiencing the blizzard of the century. Ski Patrol members were bombing the hill, blind firing in whiteout conditions to prevent a massive buildup. However, when a wall of ice hit the ski terminal building at the base of the mountain, everyone asked how could this happen? Who was buried beneath? Is anyone still alive underneath the snow?

media:content.media:title: A Ski Resort Buried Overnight After the Alpine Meadows Disaster
media:content.media:description: In March of 1982, Alpine Meadows ski resort near Lake Tahoe was experiencing the blizzard of the century. Ski Patrol members were bombing the hill, blind firing in whiteout conditions to prevent a massive buildup. However, when a wall of ice hit the ski terminal building at the base of the mountain, everyone asked how could this happen? Who was buried beneath? Is anyone still alive underneath the snow?
